{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tower of Seven Moons
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Tower of Seven Moons]] is a relic of the southern [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Tower of Seven Moons]] is a location loomed over by the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
